{{Quote|When we Vulkars win this year, it'll be over for you Hidden Beks!|translated=1|Doba on the [[Hidden Beks]]|<ref name="kotor" />}}
'''Doba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]], and a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] in [[3956 BBY]]. He was not as skilled as [[Redros]] in [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]], and was rarely, if ever, favored because of this. Despite being a member, he fled the track when [[Brejik]] ordered all Vulkars to attack [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Bastila Shan]].<ref name="kotor" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
